nasb.text: Therefore thus says the Lord in regard to Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah, “They will not lament for him: ‘Alas, my brother!’ or, ‘Alas, sister!’ They will not lament for him: ‘Alas for the master!’ or, ‘Alas for his splendor!’

esv.text: Therefore thus says the Lord concerning Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah: “They shall not lament for him, saying, ‘Ah, my brother!’ or ‘Ah, sister!’ They shall not lament for him, saying, ‘Ah, lord!’ or ‘Ah, his majesty!’

cnv.text: 因此，論到猶大王約西亞的兒子約雅敬，耶和華這樣說： “人必不為他哀傷，說： ‘哀哉，我哥哥！’‘哀哉，我姊姊！’ 人必不為他哀傷，說： ‘哀哉，主上！’‘哀哉，尊榮的王！’

ccb.text: 因此，论到犹大王约西亚的儿子约雅敬，耶和华说： “没有人会为他哀悼说， ‘唉，我的弟兄啊！ 唉，我的姊妹啊！’ 没有人会为他哀悼说， ‘唉，主人啊！ 唉，他的尊荣！’
